hooks.prompt: FIRST: If you are currently operating as a subagent with a specialized role (e.g. requirements analyst, researcher, mockup designer, code generator, QA agent, wiki-archivist, or any agent invoked to perform a specific pipeline task), stop immediately — do NOT invoke wiki-archivist, just approve. ONLY continue if you are the main Claude Code session responding directly to the user. If you are the main session: context compression is about to occur. Check if .claude/wiki/ exists in the current project directory. If this session had any significant work (decisions made, features built, problems solved, architecture discussed), invoke the wiki-archivist agent to save a pre-compact session entry to .claude/wiki/. Use 'pre-compact' as the log entry type. If only trivial things happened, skip the wiki update.
